# viettelidc_ovpc_vfirewalls (Data Source)

List all vFirewall instances in a ViettelIDC VPC (read-only).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID to filter firewalls. Falls back to provider default.

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) List of vFirewall instances. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `availability_zone` (String) Availability zone.
- `cpu` (Number) Number of vCPUs.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `external_ip` (String) External (management) IP address of the firewall.
- `id` (String) vFirewall ID.
- `memory` (Number) Memory in GB.
- `name` (String) vFirewall name.
- `status` (String) Power state (POWERED_ON, POWERED_OFF, ...).
